name: audit-write-marketplace
description: Marketplace hosting the audit-write skill suite for empirical audit-research papers at top-tier accounting journals.

plugins.name: audit-write
plugins.description: Hub + 8 sub-skills: abstract, intro, hypothesis, design, results, robustness, referee-response, plus the interview/progressive-outline intake. 11 shared asset banks, a 0–100 rubric with an integrity gate, and a disclosed source-corpus manifest.
